Site ownership

Legal / Copyright Notice

This page is the static copyright and demo-use notice for the Agent Command Center. It is informational only and does not create a license or grant any runtime capability.

Copyright notice

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Built by Devin O’Rourke.

Viewing this page does not authorize reuse, redistribution, or commercial reuse.

Copyright Notice

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Protected Materials

The Agent Command Center website, demo hub, stakeholder presentation, simulator, system-scale pages, registry presentation, visual layout, page copy, dashboard structure, validation descriptions, review materials, and related static artifacts are protected project materials.

No License Granted

Viewing this public demo does not grant permission to copy, reproduce, redistribute, sell, sublicense, train on, scrape for reuse, modify, or incorporate these materials into another product, service, presentation, dataset, or commercial offering without written permission from the copyright owner.

Static Demo Boundary

This website is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not run live agents. It does not execute commands. It does not write to Supabase. It does not mutate databases, perform deployments, send alerts, trigger rollbacks, or activate automation.

Registered Agents vs Live Runtime

The system-scale pages may describe registered command-center operating units from a static registry. Those registry counts do not mean live autonomous agents are running. Live runtime agents enabled: 0. Runtime activation has not started.

Third-Party References

Any third-party product names, platforms, services, libraries, or trademarks mentioned are used for identification or contextual reference only and remain the property of their respective owners. No endorsement or affiliation is implied unless expressly stated.

Portfolio / Review Use

This site may be shown for portfolio, stakeholder review, technical discussion, or demonstration purposes. Any reuse beyond viewing the demo requires written permission.

Contact

For permission requests or questions, contact the site owner through the contact channel provided with the portfolio or repository.

Non-Legal Advice Note

This page is a project notice and not a substitute for legal advice.
